TimeEntry.Title: Manage Engine Version Update to 11.5.2600.32.W for CBI Machines
TimeEntry.Notes:
Manage Engine has been successfully updated to version 11.5.2600.32.W on the following machines:

  1. CBILT06
  2. CBILT09
  3. CBILT10

Action Taken:

  • Logged into each machine.
  • Verified the existing Manage Engine version.
  • Updated the agent to 11.5.2600.32.W.

Outcome:

  • The update was completed successfully on all machines.
  • All systems are working fine after the update.

TimeEntry.Title: CBILT11, CBILT06 : Cisco umbrella syncing issue due to old version, updated
TimeEntry.Notes: I removed the old version and successfully installed the latest version (Cisco Secure Client for Windows 5.1.16.194) on both machines. They are now syncing properly with the server. Myrmm also updated with latest software updates.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: Manage-Engine Latest version updated 11.5.2600.32.W - CBILT09, CBILT02, CBILT06
TimeEntry.Notes: Manage-Engine Latest version updated 11.5.2600.32.W - CBILT09, CBILT02, CBILT06

TimeEntry.Title: Observed a synchronization issue in Manage Engine on the following machines:CBILT02,CBILT06,CBILT09,CBILT12
TimeEntry.Notes:
Action Taken:

Logged into the Manage Engine portal.
Checked the agent status for the listed machines.CBILT02,CBILT06,CBILT09,CBILT12
Identified synchronization issues.
Performed necessary troubleshooting steps to re-establish communication between agents and the Manage Engine portal.
Outcome:

Synchronization issue has been resolved.
All machines are now syncing properly with the Manage Engine server.
Systems are working as expected.

TimeEntry.Title: Crowdstrike latest version(7.35.20709.0)updated on machines: CBILT02, CBILT04, CBILT09, CBILT12
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into Crowd strike portal to check the machines with outdated version. Found machines CBILT02, CBILT04, CBILT09, CBILT12 running with older version of crowd strike. So connected to machines and uninstalled the old version and downloaded and installed the latest sensor version 7.35.20709.0 of CrowdStrike, verified from the portal. it is updated now. Hence closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: CBI– Network Detective Report Generated and Updated Under Teams
TimeEntry.Notes: As per assigned task by lead, Network Detective reports were generated successfully for CBI Client. Checked and verified the reports are proper. Then uploaded the report to the appropriate client Teams channel for CBI. It is now ready for review and take actions on alerts.

TimeEntry.Title: Huntress Agent updated with Version 0.14.162, replaced with Version 0.14.150 on CBILT12, CBILT06, CBILT02
TimeEntry.Notes: Huntress Agent updated with Version 0.14.162, replaced with Version 0.14.150 on CBILT12, CBILT06, CBILT02

TimeEntry.Title: Myremote version upgrade to Latest Version -26.1.25.9592 for CBILT09
TimeEntry.Notes: Checked and found that the computer CBILT09 was running an old version of ScreenConnect. update the software from the portal to the new version V 26.1.25.9592. After updating, verify that the version on the portal has been successfully updated to the latest version. Hence Closing this ticket

TimeEntry.Title: CBILT07,CBILT12 : Manually update cisco as APD missed to update
TimeEntry.Notes: I downloaded the latest version of Cisco Secure Client (5.1.16.194) and successfully deployed it to the machines. Afterward, I rescanned the patch, and it is now updated in myRMM as well.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote
